market.metaTitle: Market Temp — the Bitcoin mood right now
market.metaDescription: Fear & Greed, funding rate, long/short ratio, 24h momentum. See the real market signals Tako reads for its oracle, laid out as gauges. An educational visualization that auto-refreshes every 60 seconds.
market.heading: 🌡️ Market Temp
market.intro: These are the signals Tako actually reads before making a call. Here we show the raw numbers for educational purposes. Learn what each one means in the <guide>guide</guide>, and see how they feed the oracle in the <algo>algorithm write-up</algo>.
market.footnote: The numbers on this page are for educational purposes and refresh roughly every 60 seconds. Reading a signal is reference only and can never be a basis for an investment decision.
market.allFailed: Couldn't load the signals right now. We'll retry automatically in a moment. 🎲
market.dataUnavailable: Couldn't load the data right now.

fng.title: Fear & Greed Index
fng.desc: A gauge of market sentiment from 0 (fear) to 100 (greed). Extreme fear has often shown up near bottoms, and extreme greed near tops.

funding.title: Funding Rate (BTCUSDT perp)
funding.desc: Positive means longs are paying shorts (crowd leaning long); negative is the opposite. Overheating often becomes fuel for a move the other way.

top.title: Top Trader Positions
top.desc: The long/short ratio of Binance's top traders. Above 1 means more longs, and Tako reads this one by leaning with it.

global.title: All-Account Long/Short Ratio
global.desc: How all accounts are leaning long vs. short. Retail makes up a big chunk, so it reads as crowd sentiment — and Tako leans against the crowd.

momentum.title: 24h Momentum (BTC)
momentum.desc: The price change over the last 24 hours. Tako reads this by hopping lightly onto a running horse (trend-following).

predict.metaDescription: Call Bitcoin long or short yourself and see how well you do on the leaderboard. A once-a-day prediction game, just for fun.
predict.loginHeading: 🔮 Your calls start after you log in
predict.loginBody: Sign in with Google to get your own track record and a spot on the leaderboard
predict.nickHint: Once you change your nickname, you can't change it again for 90 days
predict.noRanking: No rankings yet. Be the first to make a call!
predict.accNeedThree: You join the accuracy ranking after 3 or more calls
predict.footer: A prediction game just for fun. Unrelated to real investing decisions or returns.

about.metaDescription: Tako is an entertainment site where an octopus reads real market signals to tip the odds a touch and call Bitcoin long or short. Here's why we built it and how it works.
about.heading: About Tako
about.q1Body: Tako is an entertainment site where you press a button and Tako, our oracle octopus, hands you a call — long (up) or short (down) on Bitcoin futures. It's light content to enjoy like pulling a fortune, not investment advice or a trading signal.
about.q2Body: Half yes, half no. Tako reads five real market signals — the Fear & Greed Index, funding rate, top-trader position ratio, all-account long/short ratio, and 24h momentum — and tips the odds ever so slightly. But it's designed so neither side ever leaves the 15% to 85% range, so the result is always random within that margin. Curious about the math? The whole thing, formulas and all, is in the full algorithm write-up.
about.q3Body: The crypto community has long joked about flipping a coin over "long or short." We figured if you're flipping a coin anyway, it'd be more fun to have an octopus who actually reads market data flip it for you. At the same time, we put together educational content so folks meeting signals like Fear & Greed or funding rate for the first time can pick up the concepts easily in the <guide>guide</guide>.
about.remember1: Every result is entertainment content, made for fun.
about.remember2: Nothing on this site is a solicitation or advice to invest.
about.remember3: Futures and leverage trading is high-risk and can wipe out your entire principal.
about.remember4: Your investment decisions and their outcomes are entirely your own responsibility.
about.q5Body: For suggestions, bug reports, or anything else, please use the <contact>contact page</contact>.

contact.metaDescription: The page for sending Tako your suggestions, bug reports, and ad or partnership inquiries.
contact.heading: 📮 Contact
contact.intro: Drop us a suggestion, bug report, or partnership inquiry. We'll reply after taking a look.
contact.disabledNotice: We're hooking up the contact channel. It'll be back shortly.
contact.accept1: Site errors and bug reports (including your device and browser really helps)
contact.accept2: Ideas for new features or fun one-liners
contact.accept3: Corrections to guide content, or topics you'd like us to cover
contact.hardBody: We don't answer questions about investment decisions (like "should I go long or short right now?"). Tako is an entertainment service — for the details, see the <disclaimer>disclaimer</disclaimer>.
contact.formSuccess: ✅ Your message is in. We'll get back to you after a look.
contact.contactPlaceholder: Email or Telegram @handle to reply to
contact.errDisabled: We can't take messages at the moment. Please try again shortly.
contact.errOther: Sending failed. Please try again shortly.

privacy.metaDescription: Tako's privacy policy. What we collect, how we use cookies (Google Analytics, Google AdSense), and your choices.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Tako (the "Site") values your privacy. This policy explains what information the Site collects and how it's used. The Site has no sign-up or login, and does not directly collect personally identifying information such as your name, email, or phone number.
privacy.s2Title: 2. Information that may be collected automatically
privacy.s2Body1: The Site is hosted on the Vercel platform. In the course of running the service, access records (IP address, browser type, access time, and so on) may be temporarily processed as the hosting provider's standard logs. This is for service delivery and security, and is not used by the Site operator to identify individuals.
privacy.s2Body2: The service also stores, as a fun feature, anonymous stats on how many oracle results came out long vs. short and the public price at the time of each oracle. This data isn't tied to any individual and is used only to show today's oracle split and accuracy.
privacy.s3Intro: To improve service quality and serve ads, the Site uses or plans to use the third-party services below, and cookies may be used in the process.
privacy.s3Ga: Google Analytics: may collect anonymized usage data, such as visitor counts and page-usage stats, to help improve the service.
privacy.s3Ads: Google AdSense: third-party ad vendors including Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits. Personalized ads may be shown in the process.
privacy.s3Body2: You can turn off personalized ads at <adsettings>Google Ad Settings</adsettings>, and opt out of third-party ad cookies at <aboutads>aboutads.info</aboutads>. You can also refuse or delete cookies in your browser settings, though some features may then be limited.
privacy.s4Body: For convenience, the Site stores in your browser's local storage your theme setting (dark/light), your last oracle result and the wait time until the next one, and whether you dismissed the Telegram notice. This data doesn't identify you, stays only on your device, and is not sent to any server. Clearing your browser data deletes it too.
privacy.s5Title: 5. Sharing personal data with third parties
privacy.s5Body: Since the Site doesn't directly collect or store your personal data, it doesn't sell or share it with third parties. The third-party services in section 3 (Google) process data under their own privacy policies.
privacy.s6Body: The Site is not directed at children under 14, and does not knowingly collect children's personal data.
privacy.s7Body: This policy may be revised in line with law or service changes, and any changes will be posted on this page.
privacy.s8Body: For privacy questions, please use the <contact>contact page</contact>.

disclaimer.metaDescription: Tako provides entertainment content and does not offer investment advice. Please read the disclaimer before using the service.
disclaimer.heading: ⚖️ Disclaimer
disclaimer.s1Body: Every result ("oracle") and piece of content Tako provides is entertainment, made for fun. Results are generated by a random draw with the odds tipped using market signals — they are not a prediction, analysis, or forecast of future prices.
disclaimer.s2Body: Nothing on the Site constitutes a solicitation to trade financial instruments, investment advice, or discretionary investment management. The operator is not a licensed financial investment business and does not give advice on any specific asset, position, or timing. All investment decisions and their outcomes are your own responsibility.
disclaimer.s3Body: Crypto futures and leverage trading is extremely volatile and, depending on the leverage multiple, can lose your entire principal (or more). As a rule, if you can't afford to lose your principal, you shouldn't take part.
disclaimer.s4Body: The market signals shown on the Site are pulled from external public APIs such as alternative.me and Binance, and may have delays, errors, or gaps. The Site does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information shown.
disclaimer.s5Body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the operator bears no liability for any direct or indirect damages (including investment losses) arising from using or being unable to use the Site.
disclaimer.s6Body: External links on the Site are provided for information, and the operator is not responsible for the content of linked sites.

guideList.metaDescription: From Fear & Greed, funding rate, and long/short ratio to the math of leverage. An educational collection breaking down the market signals Tako reads for its oracle.
guideList.heading: 📚 Guide
guideList.intro: The signals Tako reads when making a call, plus the basics you need to understand the crypto market, all in plain language. The last piece fully reveals this site's oracle algorithm, formulas and all.
